gender.question: What's your gender?
gender.maleDescription: Masculine plan visuals and body guidance.
gender.femaleDescription: Feminine plan visuals and body guidance.

young.title: Young energy
young.note: We can push a bit more on pace and recovery.

balanced.title: Balanced phase
balanced.note: Your plan will blend progress with sustainable habits.

mature.title: Mature rhythm
mature.note: Consistency and recovery will matter more.

compact.title: Compact frame
compact.note: Targets will be calibrated to a shorter height profile.

balanced.title: Balanced frame
balanced.note: This sits around the center of our height planning range.

tall.title: Tall frame
tall.note: Energy and weight targets will scale for a taller body frame.

messages.lose: Losing {{value}} kg is your next milestone.
messages.gain: Gaining {{value}} kg is your next build phase.
messages.maintain: You are aiming to stay close to your current form.

025.title: Easy rhythm
025.description: Small weekly changes with a lighter routine.

05.title: Balanced pace
05.description: Best balance between momentum and sustainability.

075.title: Focused push
075.description: Noticeable weekly progress with more structure.

1.title: Fast track
1.description: Most aggressive pace. Better for short bursts.

activityLevel.question: How active are you?
activityLevel.sedentaryDescription: Little to no exercise, desk job

lifestyle.title: What does your daily rhythm look like?
lifestyle.description: We will adapt workout volume and nutrition to your real routine.
lifestyle.weeklyWorkoutCount: How many workouts can you do per week?
lifestyle.weeklyWorkoutCountDescription: Choose a realistic weekly rhythm so the plan fits your schedule.
lifestyle.workoutExperienceDescription: Exercise difficulty will match your current training level.

workoutExperienceDescriptions.beginner: You are still building technique and consistency.
workoutExperienceDescriptions.intermediate: You know the basics and train regularly.
workoutExperienceDescriptions.advanced: You are ready for more complex exercises and load.

lifestyle.sleepHours: How many hours do you usually sleep?
lifestyle.cookingAccess: How do you usually handle meals?
lifestyle.cookingTime: How much time can you spend cooking?

errors.weeklyWorkoutCount: Choose a weekly workout count from 0 to 7.
errors.sleepHours: Sleep hours must be between 0 and 16.

5.label: 5+ meals
5.title: Frequent fuel
5.description: Many smaller meals during the day.

waterHabits.question: How much water do you drink?

8.label: 7+ glasses
8.title: Strong habit
8.description: Two liters or more a day.

underweight.label: Below range
underweight.description: You are still below the balanced BMI zone for your height.

healthy.label: Healthy range
healthy.description: This sits inside the balanced BMI zone for your height.

aboveRange.label: Above range
aboveRange.description: This is a little above the balanced BMI zone for your height.

highRange.label: High range
highRange.description: This is well above the balanced BMI zone for your height.

foodBudget.title: What's your food budget?
foodBudget.description: Your meal plan will use this UZS budget and selected period.
foodBudget.helper: Not sure yet? You can skip this step.
foodBudget.error: Budget must be a non-negative number.

chipSelect.error: Could not load options. Try again.
chipSelect.otherDescription: Search the catalog or add your own item if it is missing.
chipSelect.featuredDescription: Tap a card for quick selection, or search below for more options.

allergies.title: What are you allergic to?
allergies.description: Select active allergy ingredients or add your own custom value.

dietRequirements.title: Any diet requirements?
dietRequirements.description: Choose halal, vegetarian, gluten-free, or any other requirements.

preferredCuisines.title: Which cuisines do you like?
preferredCuisines.description: Your meal plan will lean toward familiar and enjoyable food styles.

dislikedFoods.title: Which foods do you dislike?
dislikedFoods.description: Choose meals that should be reduced or excluded from your plan.

preferredIngredients.title: Which ingredients do you like?
preferredIngredients.description: Ingredients you like will get priority in the meal plan.

dislikedIngredients.title: Which ingredients do you dislike?
dislikedIngredients.description: Select ingredients to reduce in the plan or add a custom value.

ingredients.conflict: This ingredient is selected in the other list. Remove it there first.

location.title: Where do you train?
location.description: Your workout plan will match the place where you exercise.

equipment.title: Which equipment do you have?
equipment.description: Select active equipment or add a custom item if it is missing.

bodyParts.title: Which body parts should we focus on?
bodyParts.description: Your workout plan will give these body parts more priority.

exercises.title: Which exercises fit you?
exercises.description: Preferred exercises get priority, disliked exercises are excluded.
exercises.conflict: This exercise is selected in the other list. Remove it there first.

preferredExercises.title: Which exercises do you like?
preferredExercises.description: These exercises will be prioritized in your personal workout plan.

dislikedExercises.title: Which exercises do you dislike?
dislikedExercises.description: These exercises will be removed or reduced in your personal workout plan.

healthConstraints.question: Any injuries or health constraints?
healthConstraints.summaryHint: Choose at least one option for a safer workout plan.
healthConstraints.noneDescription: No separate health constraints for workouts
healthConstraints.defaultDescription: This will be considered when building your plan.
healthConstraints.injurySeverityQuestion: How serious is the injury or limitation?
healthConstraints.injurySeverityDescription: This helps us tune exercise safety and training intensity.

severityDescriptions.none: No serious injury, or you are not sure.
severityDescriptions.mild: Light discomfort that usually does not block training.
severityDescriptions.moderate: Some exercises need to be selected carefully.
severityDescriptions.severe: The workout plan should stay very conservative.

healthConstraints.forbiddenExercisesQuestion: Any exercises forbidden by a doctor?
healthConstraints.forbiddenExercisesHint: Separate each exercise with a new line or comma.
healthConstraints.medicationsDescription: Optional. Add this so the plan can consider general safety constraints.
healthConstraints.supplementsDescription: Optional. Add protein, creatine, vitamins, or anything similar.

dietRestrictions.question: Any diet restrictions?
dietRestrictions.subtitle: We'll shape meals and suggestions around this.
dietRestrictions.helper: Choose everything that fits you. If nothing applies, select the no restrictions card.
dietRestrictions.summaryHint: Choose at least one option so we can personalize your plan.
dietRestrictions.summaryNone: Perfect. We'll keep your recommendations broad and flexible.
dietRestrictions.paleoDescription: Whole foods with no processed grains

completion.title: Great result!
completion.description: Your personal profile has been created.

review.title: Review your information
review.description: Confirm your key answers before Liveon creates your personal plan.

loading.title: Setting everything up for you
loading.errorDescription: We could not prepare your personal plan. Try again.

result.title: Your plan is ready
result.subtitle: Here is what you need to change:
result.generateError: Could not start personal plan generation.
result.lowCalorieWarning: This calorie target may be too low. Choose a safer range.
result.lowFatWarning: Fat intake may be too low.
result.balanceUnknown: Not enough data to calculate macro balance.
result.balanceGood: Macros are close to the calorie target.
result.preferencesDescription: These values are sent into the next meal plan, workout plan, and tracking generation.

dailyCalories.title: Edit daily calories
dailyCalories.description: Review the recommended value or enter a safe custom target.

proteinGram.title: Protein target
proteinGram.description: Enter grams. Recommendation is calculated from your body weight.

carbsGram.title: Carb target
carbsGram.description: Check how carbs affect your calorie balance.

fatGram.title: Fat target
fatGram.description: Enter grams. We warn you if fat is too low.

currentWeight.title: Current weight
currentWeight.description: This is the core body metric for tracking and recalculation.

targetWeight.title: Target weight
targetWeight.description: Changing target weight recalculates calories and macros.

goal.title: Primary goal
goal.description: Changing the goal adapts calorie direction, workout focus, and meal planning.

weeklyWeightChangeGoal.title: Weekly pace
weeklyWeightChangeGoal.description: Changing pace recalculates daily calories and estimated goal date.

mealsPerDay.title: Meal count
mealsPerDay.description: This affects personal meal plan generation.

weeklyWorkoutDays.title: Workout days
weeklyWorkoutDays.description: The weekly workout schedule is built from this number.

activityLevel.title: Activity level
activityLevel.description: This affects daily energy expenditure and how aggressive the plan should be.

foodBudget.title: Food budget
foodBudget.description: AI meal planning uses this budget when choosing ingredients and foods.

allergies.title: Allergies
allergies.description: AI meal planning excludes or treats these ingredients and custom values carefully.

dietRequirements.title: Diet requirements
dietRequirements.description: Halal, vegetarian, lactose-free, or other requirements are sent into the next meal plan generation.

dislikedFoods.title: Disliked foods
dislikedFoods.description: Choose foods that should be reduced, avoided, or replaced in the plan.

workoutExperience.title: Workout experience
workoutExperience.description: Exercise difficulty and progression are adapted to this level.

sleepHours.title: Sleep hours
sleepHours.description: Used to tune recovery and weekly training load.

workoutLocation.title: Workout location
workoutLocation.description: Exercises are selected for home, gym, or outdoor training.

equipment.title: Choose equipment
equipment.description: Select active equipment or add a custom item.

injurySeverity.title: Injury severity
injurySeverity.description: Workout intensity is adjusted to keep the plan safer.

forbiddenExercises.title: Forbidden exercises
forbiddenExercises.description: Enter doctor-forbidden or self-forbidden exercises. Put each one on a new line.

report.generatingTitle: Your health report is being prepared
report.generatingDescription: We are combining your onboarding, profile, and tracking data so AI can prepare a localized personal wellness report.
report.heroSubtitle: Built for your goals, body and habits
report.errorTitle: Could not prepare the health report
report.errorDescription: A temporary issue happened while generating the AI report. Try again or continue to the dashboard.
report.userSnapshotDescription: A short snapshot built from your onboarding and profile data.
report.actionPlanDescription: Simple, practical next steps for the next 7 days.
report.cautionDescription: Points worth watching to keep the plan realistic and sustainable.
report.focusAreasDescription: Short guidance by habit area. Scan, then start tracking.
report.sevenTipsDescription: Short practical tips from your AI report. Start with the easiest one today.
report.sleepSummary: Sleep anchors recovery, appetite, and training consistency.

collecting.title: Collecting your data
collecting.description: Profile, onboarding, and tracking signals are being gathered for your health report.

analyzing.title: AI is analyzing
analyzing.description: AI is checking your health signals, goal, and progress rhythm together.

planning.title: Building your plan
planning.description: Workout, food, sleep, and weekly rhythm are being shaped into one practical plan.

finalizing.title: Finalizing report
finalizing.description: The final report view is being assembled with your key scores and action plan.

category.question: What type of coaching do you provide?

experience.question: Select your experience

beginner.label: Less than 1 year
beginner.description: New to coaching or worked with a small number of clients.

intermediate.label: 1-3 years
intermediate.description: Stable experience and practical coaching processes.

advanced.label: 3-5 years
advanced.description: Result-driven clients and an established method.

expert.label: 5+ years
expert.description: Broad experience, many results, and deep expertise.

experience.infoTitle: Your profile will be ready quickly
experience.infoDescription: Experience is used in the coach dashboard and client-facing profile summary.

specialization.question: Choose your specializations
specialization.description: Separate specializations with commas or new lines.
specialization.emptyTitle: No specializations found for this category.

certification.question: Certification details
certification.fileSizeError: Each file must be 8MB or smaller.
certification.noCertificate: I do not have a certificate
certification.namePlaceholder: For example, UEFA C, Boxing Coach, NASM CPT
certification.fileDescription: JPG, PNG, or PDF. Each file can be up to 8MB.
certification.requiredFile: Upload at least one certificate file.

bio.question: Write your coach bio
bio.label: Bio
bio.placeholder: I am a coach focused on healthy nutrition and weight management. I help clients build plans, accountability, and daily habits.
bio.infoTitle: Keep it short, clear, and credible
bio.infoDescription: Two or three sentences about your experience, main direction, and client results are enough.

pricing.question: Set your pricing and work format

languages.question: Which languages do you work in?
languages.reachDescription: Language filters help matching users find your profile faster.
languages.marketplaceDescription: The right language choice improves your visibility.

avatar.question: Upload your profile photo
avatar.imageOnlyError: Only image files can be uploaded.
avatar.fileSizeError: Image size must be 5MB or smaller.
avatar.successDescription: Your coach profile has been created successfully.
avatar.idleHint: Click or drag an image here
avatar.helper: This image appears on your marketplace card. Optional — you can add it later.

roleUpgrades.title: Choose a role
roleUpgrades.description: What area would you like to start working in?
